name: MAC-10 | 孔雀石
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been painted using metallic effect paints and given a wavy pattern using a rubber comb tool. Bright colors hide a gun with a dark purpose
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器使用金属涂料进行了涂装，并使用橡胶工具梳理成波浪图案。 鲜亮的颜色下竟隐藏着一把图谋不轨的冷枪
